heading: Facilitating access to Department of State
label: 2680–2 Facilitating access to Department of State

children.heading: Procedures to facilitate access
children.label: a Procedures to facilitate access
children.text: The Department of State shall maintain procedures to ensure that the members and staff of the congressional committees of jurisdiction are granted easy access to the Department of State in the conduct of their duties.

children.heading: Parking
children.label: b Parking
children.text: The Department of State shall also make available adequate parking for members and staff of the congressional committees of jurisdiction in order to facilitate attendance of meetings at the Department of State.
